allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in {**p.get\('devDependencies',{}\), **p.get\('dependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'vitest' in k or 'playwright' in k or 'jest' in k or 'test' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(p.get\('scripts',{}\), indent=2\)\); print\('---'\); vt = p.get\('devDependencies',{}\).get\('vitest',''\); print\('vitest:', vt\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps = {**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('jsdom:', deps.get\('jsdom','not found'\)\); print\('happy-dom:', deps.get\('happy-dom','not found'\)\); print\('@vitest/browser:', deps.get\('@vitest/browser','not found'\)\)")
